title: paspalum exaltatum
intro: Paspalum exaltatum, also known as tall paspalum, is a type of grass native to the Americas, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Paspalum exaltatum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Paspalum exaltatum typically involve drying the leaves and roots, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea or decoction, which can be used to treat various health issues.
